claim: The L3a axiom/world layers read certain minted concept URNs as RELATIONS with a stipulated direction: molecules-v0 'mother' as the functional relation forward=(child -> mother) (the maintainer's mother(Elvis)=Gladys reading), 'father' likewise; kernel-v0 'maker-of' as forward=(maker -> artifact); kernel-v0 'part-of'/'has-part' as a mutually inverse pair. These concepts' explications are role/kind scenarios, not natively relational schemas; the relational reading is an alias stipulation of the L3a corpora, not a property of the concepts.
rationale: v0 has no natively minted relational concepts for the family litmus (has-parent/has-mother do not exist; design-constraint-layer.md section 1.4). Stipulating the reading lets the engine leg run today on real minted URNs. Revisit condition: when relational concepts (has-parent, has-mother, person) are minted natively, re-author axioms-v0/world-v0 against them and re-run as a successor id; the stipulation then lapses.

claim: The kot-query/1 define-op is the closed two-shape operator DEFINE (retrieve a concept's endorsed genus-differentia definition at one level, verbatim) plus DEFINE-MATCH (exact structural set-equality of a candidate definition against it); there is no third shape and any addition is a grammar-version change.
backing_ref: docs/design-kot-query-define-op.md §2 / §2.3
rationale: The programme proceeds on the two-shape surface because DEFINE + DEFINE-MATCH is the minimal grammar that makes definitional items checkable; the stipulation falls only if a third definitional question-class is found unrepresentable.

claim: In DEFINE-MATCH a licensed definitive false is sound (unlike lookup/instance which refuse on absence) because a logicalDefinition is a closed, complete object about its own definiendum, so 'candidate != X's endorsed definition' is a licensed negative, not a CWA incompleteness.
backing_ref: docs/design-kot-query-define-op.md §2.2 (contrast §6/C1); docs/design-l3a-rules-engine-oracle.md §4
rationale: The programme proceeds because definitional closure — the endorsed definition is the whole, complete stipulation about X — licenses a definitive negative that makes def-MMLU distractor options checkable; the cross-vendor audit is the check and if false-licensing proves unsound the op reverts to DEFINE-only.
notes: define-op design premise (memo ASM-DEF-2); its audit is the §7.4 kill check.

claim: The definitional licence is a stratum-3, corpus-scoped 'definitional' endorsement record admitting a pinned onto-obo shard's logicalDefinitions (by shard name + sourceVersion sha) as a definitional-source, with an optional per-concept override retained.
backing_ref: docs/design-kot-query-define-op.md §3 / §3.1
rationale: The programme proceeds on corpus-scoped granularity because a shard shares one provenance, semanticStatus, licence and extraction sha, so a single shard-scoped endorsement keeps the governance act legible and cheap while the per-concept override still allows dis-endorsing a contested definition.

claim: 'definitional' is a new kot-axiom/1 endorsement-kind, disjoint from the extension-constraint kinds {functional, cardinality, disjointWith, inverseOf, domain, range}; it is validated and consumed only by the define-op and never enters the CWA store-validation pass over world-layer facts.
backing_ref: docs/design-kot-query-define-op.md §3 / §3.1
rationale: The programme proceeds on the disjoint endorsement-kind because keeping the definitional endorsement (stratum-3 governance) out of the world-layer CWA pass preserves strata separation: definitions stay in identity/hash, endorsements stay a sidecar governance act.

claim: The WiC / definitional-MMLU kappa_B yield of the define-op is a projection, not a measured quantity: the substrate is biomedical (GO/PO) and WiC is general-vocabulary, so the define-checkable yield may be small or ~0.

claim: The define mapper leg is a closed pinned template inventory plus an onto-obo annotation-label->URN index reusing the mapper's abstain-on-ambiguity discipline (exactly-one-URN maps; more-than-one abstains; zero unmapped); it resolves no word sense and no ambiguous label, so a mapper-parse is emitted only when TERM/GENUS/REL/FILLER each resolve to exactly one URN.
backing_ref: docs/design-kot-query-define-op.md §5 / §5.1
rationale: The programme proceeds on closed-templates + abstain-on-ambiguity because it reuses the mapper's existing verified discipline so no sense or ambiguous label is silently resolved, and the census prices the gold-parse-vs-mapper-parse loss separately rather than the design guessing it.

claim: A seeded synthetic 3-generation-family 2-hop composition eval (data/nsk1-eval: 1000 covered + 100 uncovered-control items over kot-world/1 records reusing the minted mother-of/father-of/man/woman kernel concepts, all facts in-context, gold labels from generator graph traversal) is an adequate grounding-sensitive covered task family for the FIRST decisive internal-vs-external kernel-loop comparison at R1-R2. Adequacy here means: composition failure is a real small-model failure mode on this shape (the back-patching literature's 2-hop setting), coverage of the covered stratum is by construction, and gold labels are independent of the kot-axiom engine's accept test (the engine resolves hop-1 only). It does NOT mean results transfer to natural corpora or public benchmarks.
backing_ref: docs/design-neurosym-kernel-internals.md section 4; data/nsk1-eval/manifest.json; f2b oracle-leakage lesson (registry/experiments/f2b-replicate.json)
rationale: Cheapest-decisive-first: the 2-hop composition shape is the one setting where (a) the back-patch literature gives a measured layer-timing failure mode to intervene on, (b) the l3a-PASS engine can resolve hop-1 with an axiom license, and (c) gold labels can be made structurally independent of the engine accept test. A natural-corpus task would import the unmeasured NL-parse boundary (l3a-parse, unrun) into the first decisive experiment and confound the internal-vs-external question this line exists to answer.
resolution_path: nsk1 Stage-0 headroom + rescuable-fraction gates decide adequacy empirically; a public-benchmark covered-slice variant is staged as a later variant of idea-neurosym-kernel-internals

claim: The NL-boundary leg is pre-registered under record topology FK-NLB-1 option (b): TWO records (l3a-parse, a5-nl), TWO per-vertical verdicts, ONE shared harness whose files are pinned byte-identically in both records. Each vertical's kill (HL3a clause 2 / its HA5 analog) can fire independently, and no cross-vertical pooled average may stand in for a per-vertical verdict. This record topology is a methodology CHOICE of the programme: the frozen parents' per-vertical successor pre-declarations are its backing, but the two-record/one-harness execution shape is stipulated, not measured.
backing_ref: registry/experiments/l3a.json + registry/experiments/a5.json design.n_planned.successors (the frozen parents each pre-declare a SEPARATE successor id gated on their own verdict); docs/design-nl-boundary-l3a-parse-a5-nl.md section 2 fork FK-NLB-1 + section 13
rationale: Two records let the parents' kill clauses fire independently - pooling verticals would smuggle a cross-vertical average into a per-vertical kill decision - while the shared harness (byte-identical pins in both records) keeps the instrument identical, so a cross-vertical difference indicts the vertical, not the tooling. Revisit condition: never while the parent records stay frozen (the FK-NLB-1 fork row is re-opens-never); if either parent record is ever superseded, the topology re-opens with its successor. Registered by the Fable designer role (nl-boundary line).
resolution_path: Not a projection to resolve: the stipulation lapses only if a frozen parent record is superseded; any consolidation into a single pooled record would be a NEW design record minting new ids, never an amendment of these two.
notes: FK-NLB-1 record-topology stipulation; cited by the section 13 DECISION line of docs/design-nl-boundary-l3a-parse-a5-nl.md. Registered 2026-07-10 to close ERR_ASM_UNTAGGED_PREMISE on that line: a methodology decision is STIPULATED, not MEASURED - the parents' pre-declarations back it, they do not constitute it.

claim: The CLUTRR covered slice - clean k=2 rows of the public CLUTRR release (Sinha et al. 2019, arXiv:1908.06177; repo facebookresearch/clutrr; licence CC-BY-NC-4.0) whose proof chain is up-edge-only over {mother, father} and whose released gold relation word (target_text) is in {grandmother, grandfather}, with the engine world store derived MECHANICALLY from the structured story_edges/genders columns (no NL parse anywhere), pooled across configs and task_split values, story-bytes-deduplicated, with per-item closed name lexicons - is an adequate PRIMARY grounding-sensitive covered task family for the first decisive internal-vs-external kernel-loop comparison (nsk1) at R1-R2, with the custom nsk1-eval corpus demoted to (i) the L*/alpha calibration split plus custom Stage-0 heatmap input and (ii) a named self-authored secondary stratum. Adequacy here means: third-party provenance of items and gold removes the designer-degrees-of-freedom and optics channels of a self-authored primary; coverage is restored by a committed mechanical filter, machine-checkable at build; and the released gold stays disjoint from the engine accept test (the engine resolves hop-1 only, and the rendered feedback never contains the gold word - build assertion). It does NOT mean results transfer to uncovered CLUTRR strata (k>2, noise configs, sibling/spouse/in-law chains), to the published CLUTRR benchmark task or leaderboard, or to natural corpora. Residual risks carried by this stipulation: pretraining contamination (public since 2019; the primary is a within-item arm contrast, symmetric in first order; headroom compression is priced by the pre-freeze gate), programme authorship of the covered-slice filter (a committed, auditable pure function), and patchscope-extraction difficulty on natural-ish story text (priced by the extraction-failure gate and the pre-freeze headroom blocker with its fallback ladder). Supersedes ASM-0023.
rationale: The maintainer's challenge and the external review both flagged the self-authored flagship eval as the programme's most visible weakness; CLUTRR is the rare public benchmark whose released structured columns (story_edges, edge_types, genders, proof_state, f_comb, target_text) preserve the design's entire honesty structure - gold-label independence, coverage-by-filter, matched-budget arm symmetry, mechanical non-NL world-store derivation - while making item text, name distribution, distractor placement, question format and gold into bytes the programme cannot have tuned. The custom corpus is retained only where third-party data cannot substitute: tuning-side calibration (strict tuning/eval provenance separation) and a named secondary stratum so an extraction-driven INSTRUMENT-INVALID on the new surface cannot leave the family with zero information for the GPU spent.
resolution_path: Pre-freeze mechanical gates decide the fallback-ladder rung that actually freezes: the covered-slice count gate (n_final >= 1000 full power; 600 <= n_final < 1000 power recomputed at achieved n before freeze; < 600 falls back) and the ~USD 2-5 headroom calibration on a discarded seed-pinned 100-item slice (text-only accuracy in [0.05, 0.85] AND external-text >= text-only + 2pp, per rung, both rungs) with the pre-declared ladder (native relation task -> entity-question form -> custom corpus primary); the frozen record names the rung. The stipulation itself is resolved or explicitly re-registered at nsk1 verdict time.

backing_ref: docs/design-neurosym-kernel-internals.md section 4; data/nsk1-eval/manifest.json; f2b oracle-leakage lesson (registry/experiments/f2b-replicate.json)
claim: A seeded synthetic 3-generation-family 2-hop composition eval (data/nsk1-eval: 1000 covered + 100 uncovered-control items over kot-world/1 records reusing the minted mother-of/father-of/man/woman kernel concepts, all facts in-context, gold labels from generator graph traversal) is an adequate grounding-sensitive covered task family for the FIRST decisive internal-vs-external kernel-loop comparison at R1-R2. Adequacy here means: composition failure is a real small-model failure mode on this shape (the back-patching literature's 2-hop setting), coverage of the covered stratum is by construction, and gold labels are independent of the kot-axiom engine's accept test (the engine resolves hop-1 only). It does NOT mean results transfer to natural corpora or public benchmarks.
notes: SUPERSEDED 2026-07-10 by ASM-0027 (append-only last-line-wins update; the id is not reused). The eval-necessity adjudication (docs/next/eval-necessity-adjudication.md section 2), on maintainer challenge plus external review and while nsk1 was still DRAFT, re-decided FK-NSK-3: the custom nsk1-eval corpus is no longer the PRIMARY eval surface for nsk1; it is demoted to the L*/alpha calibration split and a named self-authored secondary stratum, roles now carried inside ASM-0027. The original adequacy-as-primary stipulation is withdrawn as superseded, not measured false.
rationale: Cheapest-decisive-first: the 2-hop composition shape is the one setting where (a) the back-patch literature gives a measured layer-timing failure mode to intervene on, (b) the l3a-PASS engine can resolve hop-1 with an axiom license, and (c) gold labels can be made structurally independent of the engine accept test. A natural-corpus task would import the unmeasured NL-parse boundary (l3a-parse, unrun) into the first decisive experiment and confound the internal-vs-external question this line exists to answer.
resolution_path: Superseded by ASM-0027; see its resolution_path.

backing_ref: docs/next/eval-necessity-adjudication.md sections 0-1 (premises tagged there: the zero-audited-end-task-wins null bound and the m0b coverage caveat)
claim: Adoption criterion for standard benchmarks across the programme's eval designs (the eval-necessity adjudication rule): an out-of-the-box benchmark replaces or supplements a custom eval exactly where it (a) actually exercises the kernel-covered slice and (b) preserves the experiment's estimand and provenance-independence structure (who authored the ITEMS, the GOLD, and the GRADER/VERIFIER); it is refused where it would be a null instrument (never touches the covered slice) or would rename the estimand. Applied 2026-07-10 across the three pending designs: nsk1 SWAP to the CLUTRR covered slice (ASM-0027); truthstyle-2x2 SUPPLEMENT with an LLMBar judge-calibration side-record while the custom 2x2 stays primary (ASM-0029); f2b-errors KEEP custom with no import (ASM-0030).
notes: A methodology rule, not a projection; re-examined whenever a new eval design adopts or refuses a public benchmark. The nsk1 instance resolves through ASM-0027's pre-freeze gates.
rationale: The maintainer's prior - self-authored evals are the programme's documented weakness - cannot be applied uniformly, because the kernel's authored vocabulary is narrow (m0b coverage_fraction 0.3542, corpus-indexed on one pinned corpus and one incomplete kernel instance): an open-domain benchmark that never touches the covered slice measures nothing about the kernel and is a NULL INSTRUMENT, not a stronger one. The two-condition rule operationalises the prior with that caveat, and the provenance-triple framing generalises the measured f2b lesson (gold sharing provenance with the grader's accept test inflates results).

backing_ref: docs/next/eval-necessity-adjudication.md section 3; arXiv:2310.07641 (2023)
claim: For truthstyle-2x2, the custom d-ts 2x2 factorial (NSM-shaped vs plain register of the SAME content, crossed with truth, on the kernel's actual canonical gloss bytes) remains the primary and only verdict-bearing instrument: no public dataset contains NSM-register definitions, let alone content-matched two-register pairs of them, so a benchmark swap would rename the estimand into a different experiment. LLMBar (Zeng et al., arXiv:2310.07641; MIT; 419 instances) is adopted ONLY as an external judge-calibration side-record - a reported-only judge-quality card for the pinned 3-judge pool (adversarial accuracy per judge), never a gate on the 2x2 - and it must not delay the timing-critical freeze (the 2x2 must freeze before f2b-transfer Stage-2 unblinds).
rationale: The estimand is a within-pair style contrast on the kernel's own bytes - irreplaceable by construction - and the first-order self-authoring channel is absent because no endpoint scores agreement with kernel gold (tier-1's gate gold is WordNet-external). What an external benchmark CAN contribute is instrument calibration: LLMBar-Adversarial measures exactly the style-over-substance judge failure family on independently authored ground, and a judge scoring near chance there recontextualises any style-robust TOST PASS. A hard cross-format gate would over-couple two different formats (pairwise choice vs single-stimulus acceptance), so the calibration is reported-only and the binding instrument gate remains tier-1 wn31.

backing_ref: docs/next/eval-necessity-adjudication.md section 4; arXiv:2412.06559 (2024)
claim: For f2b-errors, the closed six-category error taxonomy stays hand-authored and pipeline-specific; no established process-benchmark taxonomy (ProcessBench / PRM800K-style earliest-erroneous-step labels) is imported, and nothing supplements the record. The record has no eval items to swap (it is a USD-0 consumer of f2b-transfer Stage-2 logs); its only custom artifact is a category schema plus a deterministic assignment tree that is a pure function of the pre-declared logged fields, and imported step-index categories would mint labels those fields cannot decide.
rationale: A descriptive taxonomy plus a cluster-bootstrap robustness primary cannot INFLATE a result - it can only qualify or undermine a Stage-2 PASS - so the self-authoring risk the adjudication polices is absent in kind here; ProcessBench labels earliest-erroneous-step indices in step-indexed math chains, and the f2b verify-retry loop has no step chain (its failure modes are loop-mechanics categories: extraction failure, non-engagement, gold-conflict, exhaust-stable/wander), so importing its categories would mint undecidable labels - exactly the storytelling the design doc already rejected; and the record dies as a confirmatory instrument the moment Stage-2 unblinds, so any benchmark-flavoured redesign spends confirmatory standing to buy nothing.

claim: B-prime host/cell selection rule: the nsk1 Stage-0 back-patch rescuable-fraction diagnostic is interpretable as a LAYER-TIMING probe only on a (host, form, shot) cell whose text-only accuracy is measured in-window ([0.05, 0.85]) - where no arm shows composition, a 'rescue' cannot be attributed to latent capability rather than perturbation noise. Per G2d the only zero-shot in-window CLUTRR cell is SmolLM2-1.7B-Instruct on the entity form (text-only 0.76, n=100, phase:exploratory), so B-prime runs single-host at R3 = SmolLM2-1.7B-Instruct, zero-shot, CLUTRR entity form (form 2). Excluded: the 135M few-shot pass cell (single-rung, text-only 0.09 guess-floor-adjacent, adds a few-shot construct change), the custom surface at R3 (text-only 0.10, double-barrelled-surname truncation confound), and both tiny hosts zero-shot (no measured composition in any arm).
backing_ref: poc/nsk1/out/g2d/g2d_summary.json sha256 93a6e951f6f8c9bcf648f704686c289241a5ac3238955df9d9846336b10b12d0; docs/next/nsk1-ladder-exhaustion.md section 6 rank 3; registry/assessments/nsk1-g2d.json
rationale: A rescuable-fraction floor is a statement about WHERE a capable computation fails in depth; it presupposes the capability exists somewhere in the host on this task. R3 zero-shot entity is the only cell where that precondition is measured, and it is simultaneously the cell where the text channel is measured strictly harmful (0 rescues, 33/76 breakage), making it the most informative site for the flagship's internal-vs-external question. Revisit condition: if B-prime PASSes and the redesigned record wants a second rung, the 360M-Instruct few-shot entity cell (text-only 0.77, exploratory) is the pre-identified candidate and requires its own diagnostic before use.

claim: Amended Stage-0 decision rule for entity-form (two-candidate-effective) surfaces: the design's bare any-grid-cell-yields-gold rescue criterion is noise-inflatable on form 2, because after the anti-echo scorer the per-item answer space is effectively {bridge, chain-top} - an arbitrary perturbation that merely flips the emitted name has roughly 0.5 per-cell 'rescue' probability and any-of-~35-cells compounds toward 1. B-prime therefore passes its floor ONLY on the two-conjunct rule: (i) one-sided Wilson 95% LB of any-cell rescue under the REAL self-patch >= 0.15 AND (ii) paired one-sided excess of real over the seed-pinned shuffled-source patch control (exact binomial on discordant items, alpha 0.05, real > control). The 0.15 floor VALUE is confirmed unchanged from the design; only the criterion gains the control conjunct.
backing_ref: docs/design-neurosym-kernel-internals.md section 4.2; docs/next/nsk1-ladder-exhaustion.md section 2b (the form-2 guess-floor recount); registry/experiments/nsk1.json stage0_floor
rationale: Keeps the pre-declared floor comparable to the frozen-intent design while making it un-passable by distribution damage (the arXiv:2410.17245 steering-fragility class). The shuffled-source control is the matched same-distribution perturbation price: same layer, same norm distribution, same plumbing, wrong item content. Revisit condition: if the CONTROL arm itself rescues at or above the floor, the form's rescue metric is declared uninterpretable and B-prime lands INCONCLUSIVE regardless of the real arm.

claim: Back-patch rescuability at useful magnitude (planning band 0.20-0.45 of swept text-only failures) extends to SmolLM2-1.7B-Instruct on the CLUTRR covered entity slice. Basis: rescue of up to 66% of failed general 2-hop factual queries measured on substantially larger hosts; no measurement exists at 1.7B or on this slice.

resolution_path: B-prime itself (poc/nsk1/out/bprime/) measures the fraction directly against the amended floor; the planning band is used only to size the swept set and frame decidability, never as evidence or premise.

claim: B-prime pre-freeze contact discipline: B-prime runs text-only plus patched probes over ALL 958 covered CLUTRR items (858 final-set + 100 discarded headroom), because the built corpus has zero unused remainder (data/nsk1-clutrr/manifest.json counts.remainder_unused = 0, n_final_covered = 858) and the headroom slice alone (24 text-only failures at R3, n=100) cannot decide a 0.15 Wilson-LB floor. This contact is permissible under the record's freeze discipline because: (i) every B-prime row is phase:exploratory - quarantined, uncitable, flips no verdict; (ii) B-prime derives NO campaign selection parameter (L*/alpha stay custom-calibration-only per the design's section 5.3 rule; the B-prime heatmaps decide only the registered maintainer fork); (iii) covered-set membership is fixed by the committed S4 predicate, so per-item outcome knowledge cannot re-select items without a visible predicate change; (iv) any later frozen record on this corpus MUST disclose the B-prime contact verbatim and its skeptic memo must attack it explicitly.

Revisit condition: if the post-B-prime skeptic memo identifies a concrete exploitation channel from this contact, the campaign rebuilds fresh items (Phase-B configs or a new covered slice) instead of reusing the touched set.

claim: FORK-4 format transfer for truthstyle-2x2: the single-stimulus yes/no/cannot-say acceptance format stands in for the f2b-line judging acts (S1 fit+identification with the S6 register-immunity instruction, and the MCQ/best-fit claim-endorsement readings) for the purpose of the style-leak guard - a style main effect bounded at +/-0.10 in single-stimulus acceptance is read as bounding the style channel of f2b-line LLM-judge endorsement readings at that margin. Single-stimulus acceptance is a DIFFERENT judging act from MCQ best-fit comparison; the transfer is a design choice, not a measurement.

Revisit condition / resolution path: if the probe reads LEAKY (FAIL), an MCQ-format successor cell is the pre-registered path before any format-specific conclusion is drawn.

claim: truthstyle-2x2 tier-2 truth labels read the concept's OWN canonical gloss as truth-correct and the length-adjacent deranged-donor gloss as truth-wrong (own-gloss-is-correct). Under H-CIRC some 'correct' labels would be false. The split is construction-fixed provenance (own vs donor), never verifier-computed, so it stays well-defined regardless of whether the labels are right; the PRIMARY endpoint pools both truth levels so the record's PASS/FAIL/INCONCLUSIVE never rests on this stipulation - only the MEANING of the truth-split Holm members (wrong-cell style inflation, correct-cell TOST) leans on it.
backing_ref: docs/design-truthstyle-2x2-f2-taxonomy.md sections 3.1 and 6.1 item 1; registry/experiments/truthstyle-2x2.json (arms_mandatory_baselines, kill_criterion_verbatim)

Revisit condition: if f2b-errors measures substantial X-GOLDCONFLICT mass on the Stage-2 external gold, the wrong-cell inflation member's interpretation must be re-read against that measurement.

claim: f2b-errors closed-set adequacy: the six-category ordered deterministic tree (X-EXTRACT, X-NONENGAGE, X-GOLDCONFLICT, X-EXHAUST-STABLE, X-EXHAUST-WANDER, X-OTHER) is an adequate cause vocabulary for the f2b-transfer Stage-2 kernel-verify-retry failure universe, operationalised by the pre-registered assignment-total gate: X-OTHER residual <= 2% of failure cells. Both the closed set and the 2% bound are design choices. The gate fails closed to INSTRUMENT-INVALID (never a hypothesis outcome), and any post-freeze category change is a new experiment id.
backing_ref: poc/f2b-errors/taxonomy.json (sha256 4326ae11a60f097f24f93b0c26883df823861c022566344d64a72dca8285164c) assignment_procedure; registry/experiments/f2b-errors.json endpoint sec-assignment-gate + kill_criterion_verbatim; docs/design-truthstyle-2x2-f2-taxonomy.md section 5
rationale: The five named categories enumerate exactly the decision paths the pre-declared logged fields can distinguish (final-attempt extraction failure; all-abstain non-engagement; final-accept-yet-ext-wrong gold conflict; no-accept with byte-identical vs differing extracted answers); naming causes the fields cannot decide (mapper/axiom/ambiguity stages this pipeline does not have) was rejected as storytelling (ASM-0030). 2% is tight enough that any systematic unmodelled failure mode (>= ~5 cells at the expected 200-450 failure cells) invalidates the instrument, while a lone anomalous trajectory (e.g., a single-attempt reject cell, which the tree deliberately refuses to name) cannot silently absorb into a named cause. Revisit condition: an INSTRUMENT-INVALID readout on /gates/assignment_total means the tree does not describe the pipeline; the successor is a new taxonomy id, never a widened residual.

claim: f2b-errors primary-inference cluster unit: concept_label is THE resampling unit for the primary concept-cluster percentile bootstrap; template_type and seed are declared cluster keys handled respectively by within-concept crossing and by seed-averaged per-item means plus a leave-one-seed-out jackknife diagnostic - they are not independently resampled.
backing_ref: poc/f2b-errors/taxonomy.json cluster_keys + declared_exploratory_reanalysis; registry/experiments/f2b-errors.json hypotheses H-ROBUST; docs/design-truthstyle-2x2-f2-taxonomy.md section 5
rationale: The G6 threat being priced is concept-level pseudo-replication (250 d-qa-t items over ~108 covered concepts x 4 templates are not 250 independent units); templates are crossed within concept, so resampling concepts carries template dependence with it, making concept_label the coarsest declared unit containing the modelled dependence; seed dependence enters the estimand only through per-item means and is monitored by the jackknife range rather than resampled. Residual risk accepted and disclosed: dependence ACROSS concepts (e.g., shared semantic fields) is not modelled and would make the cluster lower bound anti-conservative; the record prices what it can measure via /analysis/cluster_ci_width_ratio and hands that number to every successor F2-line SAP.

claim: f2b-errors inference constants: the primary uses a percentile (not BCa) concept-cluster bootstrap, B=10000, PRNG seed 20260710, one-sided 95% lower bound, PASS iff lb > 0 (sign robustness; smallest_effect_of_interest 0.0); the pseudo-replication price is the 90% percentile-interval width ratio (concept-cluster over item-level, 2000 item resamples).

B and the PRNG seed are copied from the Stage-2 SAP constants (analysis/f2b_transfer.py, B=10000, seed 20260710) so no run-time discretion exists. The lb > 0 sign criterion matches the question actually asked - does the SIGN of the Stage-2 lift survive concept clustering - and deliberately claims no new effect size.

claim: f2b-errors conditionality and consumer binding: the primary is evaluated ONLY if the f2b-transfer Stage-2 frozen SAP rejects its null (/analysis/stage2_primary_reject echoed fail-closed from the Stage-2 pinned analysis output); otherwise the record reads INCONCLUSIVE by rule. claim: The define-op SSC5 definitional-uniqueness item-eligibility filter is operationalized as an inverse-index collision count over the SS2.2 DEFINE-MATCH canonical form: build inv[key] -> sorted set of licensed concept URNs where key = canonicalise(defn[X]) (genus as sorted urn:kot: set + differentiae as sorted (relation-URN,filler-URN) set, serialised deterministically) over only resolved defn entries; for a candidate-bearing benchmark item whose candidate resolves to key_item, let n = |inv.get(key_item)|; the item is define-checkable only if n == 1, is DROPPED from the checkable slice as INELIGIBLE_DEFN_COLLISION iff n >= 2 (a census-eligibility exclusion, NOT an engine refusal — DEFINE-MATCH stays sound per subject), and n == 0 is the ordinary no-match case handled by DEFINE-MATCH, never by C5. The filter is pure census (bead hu10) instrumentation over the already-built engine index and requires no engine or mapper change.
backing_ref: docs/design-kot-query-define-op.md SS6 C5 (operationalization) + SS2.2 (canonical form) + SS7.2/SS10.1; bead kernel-of-truth-hu10 (b-cov define-lane, SSC5 filter); tools/axiom/kot_axiom.py _canonicalise_candidate + _build_definitional_index (the canonical form + index this reuses)
rationale: Bead hu10 needed the C5 filter specified precisely enough to be a mechanical build; the memo previously described the collision hazard conceptually but did not pin the algorithm (index scope, match relation, threshold, exclusion-vs-refusal distinction). Reusing the engine's SS2.2 canonical form and the endorsed defn index makes C5 deterministic given the endorsed index + census hash, and keeps it disjoint from engine soundness (the op answers 'is this X's definition' per subject; C5 only guards item-level question well-formedness).
resolution_path: Implemented in the b-cov define-lane census (bead hu10): report N dropped by C5 alongside N_checkable/N_total per census row. The DEFINE-MATCH per-subject soundness audit (ASM-DEF-2 / ASM-0016 lineage) is the check that C5 exclusion never masks an engine unsoundness.

claim: B-double-prime (B2P) gate read-out: source-keyed counterfactual-pair discrimination with a paired teacher-forced margin. For each swept item i with candidate pair {top_i, bridge_i}, two donor carriers byte-identical except for the answer-slot name yield Delta_v = v_top - v_bridge at the harvest layer; the injection for key=top is the +alpha-scaled unit Delta_v, for key=bridge the sign-flipped vector; the read-out is m(v) = logp(' '+top_i | prompt, inject v) - logp(' '+bridge_i | prompt, inject v), teacher-forced over each candidate's full token sequence, and the per-(item, cell) success bit is m(+) > m(-) with ties and non-finite margins counted as failure. The shuffled-source control uses the unit Delta_v of the deranged item sigma2(i) with a seed-pinned fair coin deciding the key-to-sign assignment, so E[control success] = 0.5 * P(no tie) <= 0.5 exactly: a content-free perturbation of ANY magnitude scores chance in expectation, closing the B-prime confound (where output-change frequency alone scored 0.525 on an any-cell exact-gold read-out). A second, reported-only role-consistent control (same deranged vector, fixed key=top -> + assignment, derived from the same forwards) separates item-keyed content from generic role-direction transfer.
backing_ref: ASM-0111 (successor-probe constraint set, clauses a+b); registry/assessments/nsk1-bprime.json fork_recommendation; poc/nsk1/out/bprime/bprime_summary.json sha256 539040e93c78ec244ad20f77ee32ab7cf19358add5033c525851cea799f1ef7c
rationale: ASM-0111(a)+(b) require a read-out a content-free perturbation cannot pass in expectation; the paired +/- margin design cancels the item's baseline preference between the two candidates, the coin-XOR construction makes the control's null exactly 0.5 by arithmetic rather than by estimate, and ties-count-as-failure biases every arm conservatively. Revisit condition: superseded for any form whose effective answer space is demonstrably larger than two candidates (a fresh per-cell null analysis is then required in that spec).

claim: B2P delivery operator: norm-matched additive contrastive injection at the final prompt-token position, single position, forward/prefill only - h_p <- h_p + s * alpha * ||h_p|| * (Delta_v / ||Delta_v||), s in {+1,-1} the key sign, alpha selected once by a pre-declared mechanical calibration (the largest alpha in the ladder {0.125, 0.25, 0.5, 1.0} whose name-emission-collapse rate on the 32-item calibration slice at the pivot cell is <= 0.10; if none qualifies, alpha = 0.125 with all collapse rates reported). NOT wholesale replacement: B-prime measured final-position replacement transplant destructive (98.5 percent mean correct-item cell breakage) and content-indifferent. The final position is retained because the additive, norm-bounded contrastive DIFFERENCE removes the foreign-context common component that drove the measured destruction, the gate read-out needs no generation coherence, and ASM-0112's resolution path runs through exactly this operator contrast.
backing_ref: ASM-0111 clause (d); heatmap_breakage_c100 + rescue_p2/rescue_p2_ctrl in poc/nsk1/out/bprime/bprime_summary.json sha256 539040e93c78ec244ad20f77ee32ab7cf19358add5033c525851cea799f1ef7c; contrastive activation addition arXiv:2312.06681 (2023)
rationale: Additive low-alpha satisfies ASM-0111(d) directly; the contrastive difference of two byte-identical-but-for-the-key donors cancels shared content (relation surface, base name, syntax, position), which is simultaneously the cleanest key encoding and the mildest perturbation; norm-matching makes alpha a resident-state-relative strength so one ladder covers all cells and items; the calibration rule is mechanical so the runner decides nothing. Revisit condition: if B2P returns INSTRUMENT-INVALID or KILL, non-final-position and multi-position additive operators are the registered next operator family, not a re-run of this one.

claim: B2P grid, floor, and multiplicity: a bounded 9-cell grid (harvest layer lh in {lay(1/2), lay(2/3), lay(5/6)}, injection layer lt in {lay(1/3), lay(1/2), lay(2/3)}; at L=24: lh in {12,16,20} x lt in {8,12,16}; pivot cell (16,12) for calibration and generation secondaries), a single floor 0.70 on keyed accuracy (chance exactly 0.5), and Bonferroni-corrected any-cell gating: PASS-KEYED iff at some completed cell the one-sided Wilson LB at confidence 1-0.05/9 (z=2.5427) is >= 0.70 AND the real arm paired-beats BOTH controls at that cell (exact one-sided sign tests on discordant items, p<0.05); KILL-NO-USABLE-CHANNEL iff at EVERY cell (all 9 completed) the one-sided Wilson UB95 (z=1.6449) is < 0.70. This complies with ASM-0111(c): family-wise PASS error is bounded by 9 x 0.05/9 = 0.05 by arithmetic because the per-cell control success probability is <= 0.5 by construction - unlike B-prime's uncorrected any-of-35 compounding of a ~0.5-probability discrete event.
backing_ref: ASM-0111 clause (c); ASM-0041 (predecessor floor-plus-control-conjunct structure); registry/assessments/nsk1-bprime.json
rationale: 0.70 = chance + 0.20 is stipulated as the minimum keyed accuracy at which residual-stream delivery could plausibly carry engine grounding usefully after Stage-1 calibration; at n=200 the rule is decidable both ways (observed keyacc >= ~0.785 clears the corrected PASS floor; a dead channel at true 0.5 clears the every-cell KILL bar with per-cell miss probability ~3e-5) with an honest INCONCLUSIVE band between. The KILL side uses uncorrected per-cell UB and an all-cells conjunction, conservative against false kills. Revisit condition: the floor value is re-derivable only in a successor spec, never post hoc on B2P data.

claim: B2P contact discipline: B2P re-touches all 958 covered CLUTRR items (text-only pass, donor-carrier forwards, keyed injections) as the second patched-probe contact after B-prime. ASM-0043's clauses carry over verbatim: (i) every B2P row is phase:exploratory - quarantined, uncitable, flips no verdict; (ii) B2P derives no campaign selection parameter (the alpha calibration and pivot-cell secondaries decide only the registered maintainer fork; campaign-grade L*/alpha remain custom-calibration-only under their own record); (iii) covered-set membership stays fixed by the committed S4 predicate, so per-item outcome knowledge cannot re-select items without a visible predicate change; (iv) any later frozen record on this corpus MUST disclose the B-prime AND B2P contacts verbatim and its skeptic memo must attack them explicitly.
backing_ref: ASM-0043 (the B-prime contact discipline this extends); data/nsk1-clutrr/manifest.json; docs/next/nsk1-bprime2-spec.md
rationale: The built corpus has zero unused remainder, so any R3 probe on this task re-touches the same covered set; extending the disclosed quarantine discipline is cheaper and more honest than building a fresh corpus for a pre-freeze diagnostic, and the revisit clause prices the exploitation risk. Revisit condition: identical to ASM-0043 - if a post-B2P skeptic memo identifies a concrete exploitation channel from this contact, the campaign rebuilds fresh items instead of reusing the touched set.

claim: Sizing prior only: a working residual-stream content channel at mid-stack should key at roughly >= 0.8 on a two-candidate discrimination (basis: token-identity read-outs from transplanted hidden states decode at high accuracy at mid layers on larger hosts in the patchscopes family; no measurement exists at 1.7B, on this form, or under additive contrastive injection). Used ONLY to justify the 0.70 floor's headroom and the n=200 power framing; never a premise for any gate outcome or spend beyond B2P's caps.
backing_ref: arXiv:2401.06102 (2024) patchscopes; arXiv:2406.12775 (2024) back-patching (instrument-class precedent, via reports/lit-structured-parsing-and-inner-symbolic.md section 2.2)
resolution_path: B2P measures keyed accuracy directly at every grid cell (poc/nsk1/out/bprime2/); whatever it returns supersedes this band, which is sizing-only and load-bearing for nothing.

claim: G3 materials concept selection: the 20 concepts are drawn from kernel-v0 EXCLUDING the 22 manifest-flagged knownWeak records, with frame-stratified quotas InstanceSchema 6 / WhenTrue 6 / RelationalSchema 8 (proportional to the corpus's 17/16/21), selected deterministically by ascending sha256('kot-g3-mat/1|seed=0|'+slug) with 'promise' (the HS2 litmus) force-included in InstanceSchema if unranked (not triggered; it ranks 4th of 9). Scope consequence: the G3 verdict licenses claims about the non-flagged kernel-v0 explications only; knownWeak records, whose per-record notes already concede inadequacy, are out of the tested population, so the verdict cannot be read as covering them in either direction.
backing_ref: data/instance-descriptions/manifest.json concept_selection; data/kernel-v0/manifest.json knownWeak; registry/experiments/g3.json design.seeds=[0] + n_planned.concepts=20; docs/research-plan/01-hypotheses-experiments.md HS3
rationale: The frozen g3 record fixes ~20 concepts x ~10 instances but not which concepts; a selection rule had to be pinned. Excluding knownWeak separates the semantics-pin question (does the necessary-conditions reading survive?) from the authoring-quality question (are these particular explications any good?) - including records whose own notes flag inadequacy would push violations that measure authoring defects into a verdict about the reading. The sha256 ranking under the frozen seed removes designer cherry-picking within the eligible set; frame stratification keeps all three explication frames in the tested population.
resolution_path: If G3 PASSes and a later bulk-authoring wave wants the verdict extended to flagged-quality records, a successor experiment over a knownWeak-included sample re-tests; the scope limit dissolves only by that measurement.

claim: G3 materials composition: each concept's 10 instances are authored 4 control / 3 necessity-stress / 3 sufficiency-stress (totals 80/60/60 of 200), where stress candidates are deliberately constructed counterexample CANDIDATES (necessity: arguably-genuine instances built so one specific explication condition plausibly fails; sufficiency: near-miss non-instances built to satisfy as many conditions as possible) and controls are typical expected-satisfiers. Interpretation consequence, binding on the readout: the measured violation rates are rates over this deliberately stress-stratified candidate set - a hard test of the universally-quantified pin C [= Pi(C) - NOT an estimate of violation frequency in natural text, and no readout may quote them as such. Decidability consequence: under the pinned analysis (analysis/g3.py, z=1.645 Wilson, n=200) PASS needs <=13 and FAIL needs >=27 confirmed violations, so each 60-instance stress lane makes both branches of the frozen two-decision rule reachable; a materially smaller lane (e.g. 20) could not trip FAIL on its own and would bias the instrument toward PASS.
backing_ref: data/instance-descriptions/manifest.json composition_rationale + counts; data/instance-descriptions/design-intent.jsonl; analysis/g3.py wilson_bounds (13/200 -> ub 0.0999, 14/200 -> ub 0.1058; 27/200 -> lb 0.1001, 26/200 -> lb 0.0958, direct computation from the pinned formula); registry/experiments/g3.json endpoints + kill_criterion_verbatim; docs/research-plan/08-stats-and-extrapolation.md 1.6
rationale: The frozen record fixes n=200 and the Wilson gates but not the material mix; the mix determines what the rate means and whether both verdict branches are reachable, so it had to be pinned and registered rather than left implicit. Authoring stress candidates does not preordain the outcome: a candidate only becomes a violation if blinded annotators independently judge concept-applies-and-conditions-fail (or the converse) - if the explications are sound, stress candidates get rejected on one side and score no violation. Controls anchor the judgment scale, provide the negative-signal mass that keeps annotators from inferring an all-violations set, and supply agreement data across easy and hard items.
resolution_path: The rate-interpretation clause is discharged by the g3 readout quoting it; if a natural-frequency estimate is ever wanted, that is a different experiment over a naturally-sampled instance corpus (D-IR-N-style mining), pre-registered separately.

claim: G3 annotator-facing operationalization: (a) Pi(C) is presented to annotators as the kernel-v0 record's gloss field rendered as an enumerated clause-wise condition list (conditions.jsonl, opaque ids K-01..K-20); the pinned semantic object remains the kot-ast/1 explication, of which the gloss is the corpus's documented human-readable mirror. (b) Judgments are collected in two passes per annotator: pass A collects the ordinary-usage concept judgment Q1 (target claim + text only, no conditions shown) and is completed in full before pass B collects the condition-satisfaction judgment Q2 (condition set + bindings + text, concept word withheld) - so Q1 cannot be colonized by the explication and Q2 is a literal condition check rather than a gestalt re-judgment. (c) Designer intent (design-intent.jsonl) is never annotator-visible, and instance texts are scrubbed of the concept word and close derivatives while target/bindings carry it by design. Violation derivation is NOT stipulated here - necessity := Q1-yes & Q2-no, sufficiency := Q1-no & Q2-yes is the frozen design's own definition (P1 HS3 / F7 verbatim).
backing_ref: data/instance-descriptions/annotation-protocol.md; data/instance-descriptions/conditions.jsonl _meta; data/kernel-v0/README.md (gloss as the explication's human mirror); registry/experiments/g3.json arms_mandatory_baselines ('blind to hypotheses'); docs/research-plan/07-redteam.md DAG-audit finding (ii)
rationale: Human annotators cannot read kot-ast/1, so SOME rendering of Pi(C) had to be fixed; the gloss is the only rendering the corpus itself certifies as the record's mirror, and enumerating it clause-wise is presentation, not translation. The two-pass order and concept-word withholding are the cheapest instrument design that keeps Q1 an ordinary-usage judgment and Q2 a checklist judgment - collapsing them into one pass would let the explication define the concept for the annotator, which is exactly the circularity HS3 exists to test for. Registered because gloss-fidelity is inherited, not re-verified here: if a gloss misrenders its AST, G3 measures the gloss, and the ASM makes that exposure explicit.
resolution_path: G4's decode-legibility probe and any gloss-vs-AST fidelity audit convert the inherited gloss-fidelity exposure into a measurement; if a gloss defect is found in a G3 concept, the affected concept's judgments are quarantined by a pre-readout amendment.

claim: Agent-authored NL phrasings produced under the section-5 blind protocol of docs/design-nl-boundary-l3a-parse-a5-nl.md (fresh authoring identities with no repo/lexicon/front-end/answer access, pinned prompts, committed transcripts, mechanical lints, recoverability audit) are an adequate held-out proxy for natural-language phrasings of the frozen l3a/a5 eval queries for the purpose of the NL-boundary records l3a-parse and a5-nl. resolution_path: A future human-authored phrasing set (or any externally sourced phrasing corpus for these queries) re-tests the same pinned pipeline; agreement retires this stipulation, disagreement bounds it.

claim: FK-NLB-8 (freeze-candidate fork, replaces the draft section-5 paraphrase quota): the draft's 'at most 50% of covered phrasings may contain the relation label verbatim' quota is REPLACED by (a) mechanically-linted syntactic-diversity quotas (>= min(6, n) distinct masked templates per covered family; no template > 50% of a family; canonical 'wh the <label> of <entity>' scaffold <= 50% per family), with free natural use of the relation's name, plus (b) a 60-item/vertical no-label synonym PROBE that is descriptive ONLY, never gated, and carved out of the envelope. Reason: the mapper lexicon carries exactly one label per concept and a rule lemmatizer with no synonym table, so no-label phrasings are unmappable BY CONSTRUCTION (measured probes: 'who gave birth to X' maps birth+give not mother; 'makers of'/'parts of' map nothing); a forced 50% no-label stratum would predetermine a FAIL arithmetically (0.5x1.0+0.5x~0 < 0.90) and make the primary undecidable at its planning value, violating the P8 section-1.6 lint the design binds itself to. The label-verbatim vs paraphrase stratification remains a reported endpoint, so residual label-use inflation is visible, not deniable.
backing_ref: docs/design-nl-boundary-l3a-parse-a5-nl.md sections 2 (FK-NLB-8), 5, 10.1; mapper/src/lexicon.ts + mapper/src/lemmatize.ts (single-label lexicon, rule lemmatizer); tools/experiments/nlb/nlb_lint.py EVAL-DIVERSITY/EVAL-SCAFFOLD/PROBE-NO-LABEL
rationale: A gate that only a known-impossible synonym capability could pass measures nothing about the deterministic boundary under test; moving the synonym question to a never-gated probe measures the same direction honestly without manufacturing the verdict either way.
resolution_path: The probe's measured rates bound the synonym penalty; a parser-investment successor (FK-NLB-3 routing) with a synonym/alias layer would re-instate a gated paraphrase leg under a new record id.

claim: FK-NLB-9 (freeze-candidate fork, DEV-set re-basing): the DEV set used to finalise the frame layer is 60 designer-authored phrasings per vertical over FRESH minted identities (data/nlb-phrasings-*/dev-entities.jsonl) that are disjoint from every scored eval item and from both world stores (mechanically linted, DEV-FRESH), and DEV items are never scored in any arm; the DEV gazetteer augmentation (world entities + dev entities) exists only in the dev pass, never in a scored arm. Under this disjointness, designer authorship of DEV is admissible despite the designer having read the lexicon: the front-end is pinned BEFORE any EVAL phrasing exists, EVAL phrasings are authored blind by fresh identities, and a designer-DEV that fits the frame to unrepresentative phrasings can only LOWER the primary (the conservative direction) - there is no channel from DEV authorship to the blind EVAL distribution.

G4 stays meaningful: it bounds front-end brokenness on phrasings the frame was ALLOWED to fit.
resolution_path: Standing for this record pair; the independent skeptic re-attack (build item 6) attacks it against the BUILT corpus before freeze.

claim: The frame layer's closed knowledge is part of the deterministic front-end under test and is legitimate NON-answer knowledge: the per-relation surface-orientation table (ROLE_DIR: which engine direction realises 'the R of E' per relation with world edges), the label-variant matcher over the mapped concept's OWN label (inflections + the two-irregular table made->make, children->child), the closed a5 op-keyword cascade, and the fail-closed op default (inverse-possessive shapes parse as lookup unless an exactly-one marker is present, because unique would GUESS cardinality and could fabricate a scalar answer). The frame layer performs NO concept aliasing: the mapper remains the sole concept-binding component, so a lexicon miss stays a mapper-abstain (clean stage indictment) and the G5 derangement of mapper bindings remains the scramble control for the whole semantic path.
